_comment: Synthetic per_competitor_record[] (design.md §3.3) for a fictional company (acme.com, category: AI agent observability). Deliberately built as the '0 named, >=2 found' demo scenario design.md §8/§11 calls out: every record has company_mentioned=false, i.e. the founder's deck named zero competitors while this workflow found four -- the severity ladder's `material` case ('we have no competitors'). Also exercises the full threat_level/switching_cost range, including nulls (Initech Trace, unassessed) and the threat_level=4/switching_cost=1 'perfect competition, 10x cheaper via bundling' case (Wayne Analytics). The threat_level=1 AND switching_cost=1 moat-bonus nonlinearity (§6.4) is a scoring-input combination, not a competitor archetype, so it is exercised directly in scoring.test.js rather than forced into a fixture record here.

competitors.name: Globex Metrics
competitors.positioning_summary: Tracing and evaluation tooling for LLM agent pipelines, targeting the same ICP as Acme.
competitors.differentiation_vs_target: Broader language-model coverage; weaker agent-specific tracing depth.

competitors.name: Initech Trace
competitors.positioning_summary: Open-source tracing layer for autonomous agents with a hosted paid tier.
competitors.differentiation_vs_target: OSS-first distribution; no bottom-up TAM sizing built into their own pitch.

competitors.name: Stark Signals
competitors.positioning_summary: General-purpose observability platform (not agent-specific) adding an AI-agent module.
competitors.differentiation_vs_target: Broad platform, incumbent distribution advantage; agent-specific depth still shallow.

competitors.name: Wayne Analytics
competitors.positioning_summary: Legacy APM incumbent bundling a basic AI-agent dashboard into its existing suite at no extra cost.
competitors.differentiation_vs_target: Bundled distribution to an existing enterprise install base neutralizes Acme's product-only advantage -- the 'perfect competition' case: verifiably 10x cheaper (bundled/free) with no niche left to defend.
